name: contextclock-desktop
description: By default, Claude Desktop has no concept of the current time. ContextClock fixes this by automatically injecting real-time temporal context into every conversation. It forces Claude to check the time before responding, tracks elapsed time during long chats, converts global timezones, and adapts to your custom working hours and off-days so Claude knows exactly when you're 'on the clock'.

tools.name: get_current_time
tools.description: Get the current local time, date, and period of day

tools.name: get_elapsed_time
tools.description: Calculate human-readable elapsed time since a given ISO timestamp

tools.name: should_refresh_time
tools.description: Check if temporal context needs refreshing. Call this before every response.

tools.name: convert_timezone
tools.description: Convert current local time to a specified IANA timezone (e.g. 'Europe/London')

prompts.name: temporal_context
prompts.description: Inject current temporal context into the conversation
prompts.text: Please keep this temporal context in mind throughout our conversation.

refresh_interval.title: Refresh Interval (Minutes)
refresh_interval.description: How often Claude should automatically refresh its time context.

work_start_hour.title: Work Start Hour
work_start_hour.description: The hour you start work (0-23, e.g. 9 for 9 AM).

work_end_hour.title: Work End Hour
work_end_hour.description: The hour you finish work (0-23, e.g. 17 for 5 PM).

work_monday.title: Work on Monday
work_monday.description: Check if you work on Mondays.

work_tuesday.title: Work on Tuesday
work_tuesday.description: Check if you work on Tuesdays.

work_wednesday.title: Work on Wednesday
work_wednesday.description: Check if you work on Wednesdays.

work_thursday.title: Work on Thursday
work_thursday.description: Check if you work on Thursdays.

work_friday.title: Work on Friday
work_friday.description: Check if you work on Fridays.

work_saturday.title: Work on Saturday
work_saturday.description: Check if you work on Saturdays.

work_sunday.title: Work on Sunday
work_sunday.description: Check if you work on Sundays.
